en.title: Edgar Cayce Prophecies - 18 Predictions from the Sleeping Prophet (1877-1945) | Full Archive & Verification
en.description: American 'Sleeping Prophet' Edgar Cayce (1877-1945) left thousands of psychic readings containing prophecies about Atlantis, pole shifts, earth changes, WWII, China, Russia, and more. Full archive with real-world verification.
